AI-POWERED SALES PERFORMANCE

Not just another CRM, Goals.com is an AI-Powered Sales Performance Platform.

With all the CRM functionality a business needs, Goals.com also provides sales teams with best-in-class goal setting, intelligent forecasting, AI-performance coaching, commission tracking, contracts, payments, real-time analytics and so much more – all within one unified platform.

When high-performing sales teams want measurable improvements in revenue, productivity, and accountability, they turn to Goals.com.

Background

Over 17 years through DigitalParc, we’ve worked with hundreds of sales teams. A common theme: nobody loves their CRM. Too complicated, too expensive, and rarely adopted team-wide. We saw a clear opportunity — a reinvented take on what a CRM can be.

Pricing Strategy|05
Built for Impact.Priced for Value.

Despite delivering enterprise-level capabilities, Goals.com is priced for mass adoption. At just $59 per user, businesses gain access to an AI-Powered Sales Performance Platform that replaces multiple standalone tools while helping sales teams close more business, improve accountability, and drive measurable revenue growth.

Few software investments offer this level of impact at such an accessible price point. This compelling value proposition positions Goals.com for maximum adoption, long-term retention, and highly scalable recurring revenue.

The Team|07
Built by Operators.Focused on Results.
Goals.com is uniquely positioned for growth. Unlike most SaaS startups, it is backed by the established team at DigitalParc —a growth marketing agency with more than 17 years of experience in software development, branding, customer acquisition, and digital marketing. This unique structure provides the expertise, infrastructure, and go-to-market capabilities needed to scale efficiently while significantly reducing execution risk.

Acquisition Interest|08
Proof of Market & Exit Potential
We’re Already Receiving Acquisition Interest
Goals.com is already attracting interest from strategic buyers who see the value in our platform and our growth potential.

Hi Andrew,

I’m reaching out on behalf of Act!, a CRM with over 21,000 SMB customer subscriptions. They asked that I connect with you about their acquisition interest in Goals.com to explore whether there may be a strategic fit and potential for an introduction.

I work for Genz & Associates, a retained M&A advisor hired by Act! to support their acquisition efforts. A potential partnership with Act! could help enhance your tech stack, strengthen your customer base, and accelerate growth. It may also offer personal opportunities such as liquidity, succession planning, or the ability to scale with a larger partner while supporting the long-term success of your employees.

Act! recognizes that exploring an acquisition involves thoughtful consideration, and their approach is centered on building relationships first.

Would you be open to a brief introductory call with my firm’s Senior Vice President Ryan Chanon and I? Even if the timing isn’t ideal, we would welcome the opportunity to connect.

Please let me know your availability for a brief call.

Eli Roybal | M&A Development

Hi Andrew,

I hope all is well.

Following up on my prior messages regarding Act! — an SMB focused CRM with over 21,000 customer subscriptions. Act! requested that we reach out to explore a potential acquisition with Goals.com.

Below are a few ways a partnership with Act! could create value for your business:

  • Flexibility to structure a transaction that fits your goals, whether that means receiving 100% cash at close, continuing in a leadership role, or fully transitioning out
  • Access to capital to accelerate growth and scale operations
  • Opportunities for employee advancement and long-term stability through 39+ year legacy in the CRM industry

Would you be open to a quick call to explore alignment? Even if now is not the right time, we’d appreciate the chance to connect and begin building a relationship.
